name: Vail Farmers' Market

Products.value: Farm-fresh produce, artisan foods, Colorado-made art, handcrafted goods, clothing, jewelry, and prepared foods from over 155 vendors

notes: On-file website (www.vailfarmersmarket.com) is live and IS the official site, confirmed as operator of both the Sunday Market (Meadow Dr., Vail Village, June 14-Oct 4 2026, 9:30am-3pm) and Thursday Meadow Market (Willow Bridge Rd/International Bridge, June 18-Sept 2026, 1:00-5:30pm). On-file Facebook URL (facebook.com//pages/Vail-Farmers-Market-and-Art-Show/108065899218940) is outdated/malformed; replaced with current official page facebook.com/VailFarmersMarket linked directly from the site. Site is JS-rendered (Squarespace-style) so exact hours were not in raw HTML but were confirmed via rendered event subpages. Could not find SNAP/EBT status, email, phone, ADA accessibility, or certified organic status clearly stated anywhere on the official site or its subpages (contact-us and become-a-vendor pages returned 404). Address on file (Meadow Dr.) matches the Sunday Market location; Thursday market is at a different location (Willow Bridge Rd) but that is a separate weekly event under the same organization, not a market address correction.
